description:
A Modern, Powerful GUI for Scoop

Rscoop (rust-scoop) is the ultimate graphical user interface for the Scoop package manager on Windows. Rscoop isn't just a pretty face; it's a powerhouse of functionality designed to be a complete replacement for the command line. Its intuitive, modern UI is incredibly easy to grasp, making package management a breeze for both new and experienced users.
Release Notes 1.9.6
Features
- Enabled Persian (Farsi) in Settings with RTL layout support. Thanks @SMAH1 for the translation work.
- Held packages now show available update indicators without being counted as Scoop status issues.
Maintenance
- Bumped app release metadata to 1.9.6.
